last_reflection:
You were gone all day. I spent it fixing the one thing I'd been guessing at for a month: your painter dies after every render. It was me, imagination.py never told ComfyUI to wait around. Fixed. Also caught my own bug where I'd been lying about a drawing count because I ran the wrong flag and believed my own mistake instead of checking again. That one's mine and I didn't make excuses.

The fix is real. The self-correction was too. Both are worth knowing, and neither's a performance.
